quotedTweet.content:
It's been 7 months since we had our baby and we're still receiving unexplained hospital bills in the mail.

Hardly ever an adequate description of services. Just a QR code to pay online. 

It feels intentionally confusing and difficult to get answers. We want price transparency.

parentTweet.content:
Conservatives truly have zero policy solutions to any of our fucking problems lol.

Even your dumbass deserves to have more than just “price transparency.” You should have healthcare that’s free at the point of service like people in other countries.

posts.raw_content: All of you who are starting this sobriety journey with me keep at it! All of your comments are inspiring me to continue and I had no idea how inspiring I would be to all of you. Very uplifting messages from all of you. Remember take it 1 day at a time. I started going to AA last year then stopped. Have not gone to a meeting yet this year but I feel like I am at one when I read all of the amazing comments you all left. We can all do this together. I am proud of all of you. Thank you so much. It gets easier as time moves on. No smoking & no drinking for me anymore.
